public_disclosure.summary: Record publications, demos, sales, thesis defenses, posters, repository releases and dates.
public_disclosure.next_check: Ask the user for all public disclosures and dates.

ownership_inventorship.summary: Record applicant, inventors, contributors, employment and sponsor constraints.
ownership_inventorship.next_check: Ask the user to confirm inventors and ownership route.

foreign_filing_or_secrecy.summary: Counsel must review foreign filing and secrecy/export constraints.
foreign_filing_or_secrecy.next_check: Ask patent counsel before filing or external disclosure.

trade_secret_redaction.summary: Record what should be redacted before outside counsel or third-party review.
trade_secret_redaction.next_check: Ask the user to identify trade secrets and third-party confidential content.

inventor_known_prior_art.summary: Keep inventor/team-known prior art separate from the agent-run public search.
inventor_known_prior_art.next_check: Ask inventors for known papers, products, patents and internal baselines.

prior_art.reason: No verified search has been run yet; record queries/results before claiming novelty.

claim_strategy.broadest_defensible_point: Broadest defensible technical point supported by artifacts.
claim_strategy.enablement_support_summary: Explain which embodiments, variants and parameters make the claim implementable.

fallback_positions.why_narrower: Explain why this fallback narrows around prior art or support risk.

draft_claims.text: Draft patent point or claim for attorney review only.

qc_review.review_summary: Run internal QC before marking READY_FOR_ATTORNEY_REVIEW.

final_delivery.open_questions_for_counsel: Review claim breadth, inventorship, public disclosure and filing route.
